_comment: Plan 04-09 fixture: 3 Decision rows for the `decision review` (or `whoop_review_decisions` mode='list') list-mode output. (1) open within window (3d/7d), (2) open over window (10d/7d → renders with the over-window asterisk), (3) followed_up (already addressed). All three texts are banned-word-free so the tone-lint contract test passes. Categories cover the three buckets the catalog uses: sleep, training, recovery.
name: decision-review-list

decisions.decision: sleep at least seven hours on training days
skip late-evening alcohol on training days
decisions.outcomeNotes: stuck with it for five of seven nights
